title: chore(devDependencies): allow for more deduplication
body:
- synchronised some dependencies
- moved to caret-everywhere to avoid needing to sync with transitive dependencies
- made "downgrade legacy" script more resilient

To verify
- all build output is identical
- all tests and scripts run identical as before

A gauge of the impact (200MB install size it seems):

before:

```
$ find . -type d -name node_modules -prune | tr '\n' '\0' |  xargs -0 du -sch
  0B    ./specs/node_modules
2.4G    ./node_modules
  0B    ./tests/utils/node_modules
2.8M    ./tests/e2e/node_modules
  0B    ./examples/js/tourism/node_modules
  0B    ./examples/js/getting-started/node_modules
  0B    ./examples/js/e-commerce/node_modules
8.6M    ./examples/js/server-rendering/node_modules
  0B    ./examples/js/calendar-widget/node_modules
  0B    ./examples/js/media/node_modules
 10M    ./examples/vue/ssr/node_modules
7.4M    ./examples/vue/getting-started/node_modules
 18M    ./examples/vue/e-commerce/node_modules
4.3M    ./examples/vue/nuxt/node_modules
 19M    ./examples/vue/default-theme/node_modules
 15M    ./examples/vue/media/node_modules
 16M    ./examples/react-hooks/next/node_modules
 16M    ./examples/react-hooks/next-routing/node_modules
110M    ./examples/react-hooks/react-native/node_modules
3.3M    ./examples/react-hooks/ssr/node_modules
  0B    ./examples/react-hooks/getting-started/node_modules
  0B    ./examples/react-hooks/e-commerce/node_modules
  0B    ./examples/react-hooks/default-theme/node_modules
 75M    ./examples/react/next/node_modules
3.4M    ./examples/react/tourism/node_modules

6.5M    ./examples/react/server-side-rendering/node_modules
4.6M    ./examples/react/multi-index/node_modules
  0B    ./examples/react/getting-started/node_modules
4.0M    ./examples/react/e-commerce/node_modules
4.8M    ./examples/react/geo-search/node_modules
6.0M    ./examples/react/react-router-v3/node_modules
3.4M    ./examples/react/default-theme/node_modules
6.8M    ./examples/react/react-router/node_modules
3.4M    ./examples/react/media/node_modules
6.3M    ./scripts/website/node_modules
1.2M    ./packages/react-instantsearch-hooks-router-nextjs/node_modules
 36M    ./packages/react-instantsearch-dom/node_modules
120K    ./packages/react-instantsearch-dom-maps/node_modules
3.1M    ./packages/instantsearch.css/node_modules
5.7M    ./packages/algoliasearch-helper/node_modules
 62M    ./packages/instantsearch.js/node_modules
120K    ./packages/react-instantsearch-core/node_modules
9.7M    ./packages/create-instantsearch-app/node_modules
 40M    ./packages/vue-instantsearch/node_modules
  0B    ./packages/react-instantsearch-native/node_modules
3.0G    total
```
